title: Zylo Subscription
description: A subscription represents a configured instance of a SaaS application within the Zylo platform. Subscriptions typically have a 1:1 relationship with a given application, though an organization may have multiple subscriptions to the same application.

id.description: The unique identifier of the subscription.

name.description: The display name of the subscription.

applicationId.description: The ID of the associated application.

applicationName.description: The name of the associated application.

status.description: The current status of the subscription.

renewalDate.description: The next renewal date for the subscription.

annualCost.description: The annual cost of the subscription.

licenseCount.description: The total number of licenses for this subscription.

usedLicenseCount.description: The number of licenses currently in use.

createdAt.description: The date and time the subscription was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the subscription was last updated.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the subscription.
